_description: Fundraising submenu options, externalized from actions.gd get_fundraising_options() (L9, #621). Dictionary key order matches the pre-L9 literals.

actions.name: Modest Funding Round
actions.description: Conservative fundraising - lower amounts, lower risk, always available

actions.name: Major Funding Round
actions.description: Aggressive funding - higher amounts but requires strong reputation

actions.name: Business Loan
actions.description: Immediate funds via debt - creates future repayment obligation
